name: MEDICINOVA INC
summary: MediciNova, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapeutics for serious diseases with unmet medical needs, targeting the U.S. market. Its primary product candidates are MN-166 (ibudilast) for neurological disorders including progressive multiple sclerosis, ALS, chemotherapy-induced peripheral neuropathy, and glioblastoma, and MN-001 (tipelukast) for fibrotic and metabolic disorders including NAFLD and hypertriglyceridemia. The company has no approved products and relies on clinical-stage development.

products.name: MN-166 (ibudilast)
products.description: Clinical-stage small molecule drug candidate for progressive MS, ALS, chemotherapy-induced peripheral neuropathy, degenerative cervical myelopathy, glioblastoma, and ARDS prevention.

products.name: MN-001 (tipelukast)
products.description: Clinical-stage drug candidate for fibrotic and metabolic disorders including NAFLD and hypertriglyceridemia.

partnerships.description: Partnered on Phase 2b SPRINT-MS clinical trial of MN-166 in progressive MS, funded by NIH NINDS.

partnerships.partner_name: National Institute of Neurological Diseases and Stroke (NINDS)
partnerships.description: Funded the SPRINT-MS Phase 2b clinical trial of MN-166 (ibudilast) in progressive MS.
